headline: BRO's Acquisition Strategy Boosts Revenues: Margins in Focus?
summary: Brown & Brown's acquisition-driven growth lifts revenues 22.8% to $5.9B, fueled by 43 acquisitions and a $9.83B Accession buy, but integration costs weigh on margins.

raw.headline: BRO's Acquisition Strategy Boosts Revenues: Margins in Focus?
raw.summary: Brown & Brown's acquisition-driven growth lifts revenues 22.8% to $5.9B, fueled by 43 acquisitions and a $9.83B Accession buy, but integration costs weigh on margins.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Brown & Brown, Lowers Price Target to $72
summary: Barclays  analyst Alex Scott   maintains Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $80 to $72.

headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Neutral on Brown & Brown, Lowers Price Target to $73
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Robert Cox   maintains Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $82 to $73.
